signals.headline: Record Institutional Inflows Confirmed with Bullish Technical Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Record Institutional Inflows Confirmed with Bullish Technical Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**

Multiple bullish signals have emerged in April 2026, including record transaction volumes, favorable Rainbow Chart levels, and MACD cross indicators pointing to potential upside[4]. Whale accumulation activity is notably increasing ahead of projected price targets[3].

signals.headline: Ethereum Surges Past $6,000 Following Pectra Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Surges Past $6,000 Following Pectra Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum has experienced a significant price rally, with one source indicating ETH is currently testing the $6,000 level[3]. This surge follows a massive institutional demand surge, with Spot Ethereum ETF inflows reaching all-time highs[3]. The **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** is entering its final testing

signals.headline: Note on Price Discrepancy:** Earlier sources from April 15-17 cited prices around $2,300-$2,358[1][2], which conflicts w
signals.raw: Note on Price Discrepancy:** Earlier sources from April 15-17 cited prices around $2,300-$2,358[1][2], which conflicts with the $6,000 reference in the YouTube source[3]. This substantial variance may reflect either significant intraday volatility, data source differences, or a major price movement between April 17 and the current date.
